title: I need to pull all tasks assigned to one person into a Kanban view board. Is there a way to do that?
excerpt: I have one user that only likes to use the Kanban view. I am trying to create one board that pulls from mutliple workspaces her assignments so that she can view all her tasks in the Kanban view. Is there an easy way to d…

posts.author: KBat (Karen Battist)
posts.cookedHtml: I have one user that only likes to use the Kanban view. I am trying to create one board that pulls from mutliple workspaces her assignments so that she can view all her tasks in the Kanban view. Is there an easy way to do that?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Karen,

Whilst you can pulls tasks from one board into the kanban view, I am afraid we do not currently offer a kanban widget - I apologise for the setback here!

I encourage you to submit your vote on the existing feature request here → Single consolidated Kanban view required for multiple projects - #2 by smvarieur
